title: Dendranthema argyrophyllum
intro: There is no information available for Dendranthema argyrophyllum.
taxonomy: Dendranthema argyrophyllum is classified within the family Asteraceae. This classification places it within the order Asterales. Furthermore, it is a species within the genus Dendranthema. Dendranthema argyrophyllum is native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The specific classification of this plant is often debated, and some sources may group it under the genus Chrysanthemum.
preparations: Dendranthema argyrophyllum is primarily used in traditional Asian medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant are made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to treat various ailments. In some parts of Asia, the plant is used to treat fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. The plant's leaves and flowers are typically harvested and dried to create the herbal preparations. These preparations are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects.
